metcon.name: Partner workout
metcon.description:
3 rounds for time (40 min time cap)
400m row
30 V-ups
20 front rack DB x2 lunges
10 DB Devil press
5 C & Jerks @80/50

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today emphasizes anterior chain and shoulders; posterior chain and arm work aid recovery without competing for CNS resources.

raw_text:
Warm up | 2min  easy row
30 sec Banded lat stretch
10 reverse lunges (bodyweight)
10 ring rows
10 air squats
10 scap push ups
10 bird dogs (slow)
5 v-ups
3 burpees & 3 snatches
Work up to C&J workout weight (3 mins)
Partner workout | 3 rounds for time (40 min time cap)
400m row
30 V-ups
20 front rack DB x2 lunges
10 DB Devil press
5 C & Jerks @80/50
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Partner workout. Rounds for Time: 400m row, 30 V-ups, 20 front rack DB x2 lunges, 10 DB Devil press, 5 C & Jerks @80/50. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back thickness, biceps.
